params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: ★★ gamma render-generation REQUEST-SIDE cross-connection intercept (P5 — proper architectural fix per #770 root cause). #770 P4 attempted lookup_key override at generate_block_response (called only when block_session fires from PII detection). But render-generation has no PII keyword in c2s body → block_session never called → override unreachable. New approach: REQUEST-SIDE intercept in on_http2_request (analogous to V6-F page-inject pattern). When (a) service=gamma, (b) api_path contains /ai/v2/render-generation, (c) query_domain_block returns recent ts → engine emits forged JSON response immediately without waiting for server. Build run_id 20260508-121642-42969. Engine code: ai_prompt_filter.cpp on_http2_request handler now has gamma render-generation cross-connection intercept block before V7-E perplexity intercept. Uses gamma_render_generation_json_v1 envelope (registered in DB) + sd->service_name http_response (warning text). Expected: render-generation gets engine forged JSON instead of server 400 → outline panel renders Korean warning.

notes: gamma P5 (true cross-connection request-side intercept) — request-side, not block_session-driven. Mirrors V6-F page-inject architecture for API endpoint cross-connection.
